more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Ramaphosa’s Visit Fuels Speculation Over ANC Succession, Links to Shaddy Zimbabwe’s Political-Business Networks
more.description: KWEKWE — South Africa’s ANC succession dynamics appear increasingly entangled with the complex political webs long associated with ZANU-PF in Zimbabwe. It is widely believed that President Cyril Ramaphosa favours his brother-in-law, Patrice Motsepe, as a potential successor—an assertion that has gained traction following Motsepe’s recent and somewhat curious CAF-related visit to Zimbabwe. more.title: Teens embrace social media and influencers for news but remain skeptical
more.description: NEW YORK — Teenagers are more inclined than their elders to get news from nontraditional sources such as social media and influencers, heralding a generational shift in how people seek out information. more.title: Kimi Antonelli wins the Miami Grand Prix for his third straight F1 victory
more.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla.— Kimi Antonelli made history as the first driver to win his first three Formula 1 races from the pole when the 19-year-old Mercedes driver won the Miami Grand Prix on Sunday. more.title: Inter Milan seals the Italian league title with 3 rounds to spare
more.description: MILAN — Inter Milan sealed the Italian league soccer title with a 2-0 victory over visiting Parma on Sunday. Inter, which needed only a draw to secure the trophy, moved an unassailable 12 points clear of 2025 champion Napoli with three rounds remaining. more.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Manchester United great Alex Ferguson was taken to the hospital after feeling unwell ahead of his former team’s Premier League game against Liverpool on Sunday.
